file_name: High Thermally Stable and Melt Processable Polyimide Resins Based on Phenylethynyl-Terminated Oligoimides Cont.md

source_refs.segment_title: 2.2. Synthesis of PEPA-Terminated Oligoimides Containing Siloxane Structure
The XRD patterns of the oligoimides were shown in Figure 3

反应条件.反应装置: 带机械搅拌、水冷凝器、Dean-Stark阱、氮气进出口的三口烧瓶
反应条件.制备过程: 搅拌至二胺完全溶解，得到均相溶液

位置索引.原文: The oligoimides derived from a-BPDA with APDS molar ratio of 0%, 10%, 20% and 30% in diamine were defined as PIS-A0, PIS-A10, PIS-A20 and PIS-A30, respectively. In a typical experiment, a three-necked flask equipped with a mechanical stirrer, water condenser, Dean-Stark trap and nitrogen inlet/outlet was placed diamine and 50g of NMP. The mixture was stirred until the diamines completely dissolved to produce a homogeneous solution.

反应条件.制备过程: 加入a-BPDA和PEPA的NMP浆料，补加NMP调整反应体系固含量至30wt%，氮气气氛下室温搅拌

位置索引.原文: Then, the slurry of a-BPDA (8.83g,30.0mmol) and PEPA (14.89g,60.0mmol) in 25g of NMP was added. The reaction mixture was adjusted to 30wt% of solid content by adding 24.5g of NMP and stirred in nitrogen at room temperature for 12h.

工艺流程.产物名称: 热亚胺化后的聚酰亚胺溶液

反应条件.制备过程: 加入甲苯后加热回流，通过共沸蒸馏脱除热亚胺化过程生成的水

位置索引.原文: After that, 10g of toluene was added into the reaction solution and the mixture was heated and refluxed at 180°C for 8-12h and, in the meantime, the water evolved in the thermal imidization was removed by azeotropic distillation.

后处理步骤: 将反应液倒入过量乙醇析出白色沉淀

位置索引.原文: After cooling down to 100-120°C, the reaction solution was poured into excess ethanol to produce white precipitate, which was then collected by filtration, washed repeatedly with ethanol, and dried in vacuum at 220°C for 4h. PIS-A0 is the product with 0 mol% APDS derived from a-BPDA.

原料.原料类型: 可固化低聚酰亚胺前驱体

反应条件.反应装置: 不锈钢模具、热压机、空气烘箱
反应条件.制备过程: 将低聚酰亚胺粉末放入不锈钢模具，置于预热至250°C的热压机，以4°C/min升温至300°C保温20min，再以3°C/min升温至360°C保温10-30min，逐步施加1.5MPa压力，然后升温至370°C保温2h，冷却至200°C后取出得到固化片，可在空气烘箱中进行后固化热处理

位置索引.原文: The oligoimide powders were put in a stainless steel mold, which was then placed in a hot press preheated at 250°C... After the mold was cooled to 200°C, the cured polyimide sheet with the dimension of 80mm × 80mm × 2mm was removed from the mold. In the postcuring procedure, the cured polyimide sheets were thermally treated in the air oven at the corresponding temperature and time.

parse.why: 目标PIS-A0是APDS摩尔占比0%的a-BPDA基苯乙炔基封端低聚酰亚胺，文中给出同系列典型合成流程及通用固化流程，据此提取对应产物节点的工艺流程

file_name: Photo-Induced Vertical Alignment of Liquid Crystals via In Situ Polymerization Initiated by Polyimide Containi.md

source_refs.segment_title: 3.1. Analysis of Chemical Structures of Polyimide
SEM is an effective method for investigating the morphology of alignment films
3.5. Contact Angles of Polyimide Alignment Layers

反应条件.制备过程: DMMDA加入三颈烧瓶后加入NMP，磁力搅拌溶解DMMDA，DMMDA完全溶解后加入BTDA，在N₂气氛室温下反应得到粘稠PAA溶液

位置索引.原文: 1.00mmol DMMDA was charged into a 50 mL three-necked flask, and 4.94g of NMP was added to dissolve DMMDA under magnetic stirring. Exactly 1.00mmol BTDA was added after DMMDA dissolved completely. The reaction was conducted under N₂ atmosphere for 4h at room temperature in order to obtain the viscous PAA solution.

反应条件.制备过程: 加入额外NMP稀释原PAA溶液至浓度5wt%，获得适合旋涂的粘度

位置索引.原文: Subsequently, another 5.48g of NMP was added to dilute the PAA solution to 5wt% to obtain proper viscosity for spin-casting on ITO glass.

反应条件.制备过程: ITO玻璃依次用3wt% NaOH水溶液、洗涤剂、酒精洗涤，之后放入烘箱干燥

位置索引.原文: The ITO glass was washed with 3wt% NaOH aqueous, detergent, and alcohol successively and dried at 120°C in an oven for 3h.

工艺流程.产物名称: ITO玻璃上的BTDA-DMMDA聚酰胺酸涂层

反应条件.制备过程: 将PAA溶液旋涂在预处理后的ITO玻璃上，旋涂参数为600 rpm 9 s，2500 rpm 30 s

位置索引.原文: The PAA solution was spin-coated onto the ITO glass at a rotation speed of 600 rpm for 9s and 2500 rpm for 30s.

工艺流程.产物名称: ITO玻璃上的BTDA-DMMDA聚酰亚胺薄膜

原料.原料名称: ITO玻璃上的BTDA-DMMDA聚酰胺酸涂层

反应条件.制备过程: 涂覆后的ITO玻璃在平板加热器上分段升温实现酰亚胺化，升温程序依次为：80℃ 30min、120℃ 30min、180℃ 30min、230℃ 1h

位置索引.原文: Then, the coated ITO glass was heated on a plate heater at 80°C for 30min, 120°C for 30min, 180°C for 30min, and 230°C for 1h in turn to achieve imidization of polyimide based on 3,3',4,4'-benzophenonetetracarboxylic dianhydride and 3,3'-dimethyl- 4,4'-diaminodiphenyl methane (BTDA-DMMDA PI) films.

工艺流程.产物名称: 组装完成的BTDA-DMMDA聚酰亚胺涂覆液晶盒

原料.原料名称: 两片ITO玻璃负载的BTDA-DMMDA聚酰亚胺薄膜
原料.原料类型: 聚酰亚胺薄膜负载基底

反应条件.制备过程: 两片涂覆PI的ITO玻璃经摩擦机摩擦后，按反平行摩擦方向组装，用胶粘薄膜间隔片设置盒间隙为40μm

位置索引.原文: Two pieces of coated ITO glass were rubbed with a rubbing machine (TianLi Co. Ltd., Guangdong, China) and assembled in the antiparallel rubbing direction with a cell gap of 40 μm, which was set by an adhesive film spacer.

反应条件.制备过程: DA与LC按重量比2/98机械混合，室温下磁力搅拌4h得到均匀混合物

位置索引.原文: DA was mechanically mixed with LC at weight ratios of 2/98, 1/99, 0.5/0.95, and 0/100 under magnetic stirring for 4h at room temperature.

原料.原料名称: 组装完成的BTDA-DMMDA聚酰亚胺涂覆液晶盒

原料.原料类型: 丙烯酸十二酯-液晶混合物

反应条件.反应装置: 平板加热器，OSRAM 300W非偏振紫外光源
反应条件.制备过程: DA/LC混合物在95℃下通过毛细管作用注入液晶盒，95℃保温20min消除流动效应，之后用非偏振紫外光辐照0.5h，光源与样品距离为10cm，DA聚合接枝到聚酰亚胺薄膜上得到DA-2
反应条件.反应条件: 紫外辐照引发接枝聚合

位置索引.原文: The mixtures were charged into cells by a capillary action at 95°C on a plate heater, and the cells were maintained at 95°C for another 20min to eliminate the flow effect. The cells were radiated with unpolarized UV light (OSRAM 300 W, ORSAM, Munich, Bayern, Germany) for 0.5h and the distance between light and cells was 10cm. DA-2 is the BTDA-DMMDA PI sample with DA/LC weight ratio of 2/98 after UV irradiation.

parse.why: DA-2为BTDA-DMMDA聚酰亚胺基底接枝2重量份丙烯酸十二酯得到的聚酰亚胺对齐层样品，按产物节点拆分抽取其直接相关的制备工艺流程，未混入其他无关样品流程。

The cells were radiated with unpolarized UV light (OSRAM 300 W, ORSAM, Munich, Bayern, Germany) for 0.5h and the distance between light and cells was 10cm. DA-2 is the BTDA-DMMDA PI sample with DA/LC weight ratio of 2/98 after UV irradiation."

file_name: Electrospun Semi-Alicyclic Polyimide Nanofibrous Membrane High-Reflectance and High-Whiteness with Superior Th.md

source_refs.segment_title: 2.4. Fabrication of PI NFM via Electrospinning
3.1. PI Resin Synthesis and Electrospun PI NFM Preparation

反应条件.反应装置: 250 mL 三颈烧瓶，配备机械搅拌器和氮气入口
反应条件.制备过程: 先将二胺BDAF溶解于新蒸DMAc，再加入二酐HTDA和额外DMAc，得到固含量25wt%的反应体系；室温搅拌24h后，加入乙酸酐和吡啶的混合物，继续室温搅拌24h

后处理步骤: 将所得粘稠溶液倒入过量乙醇中析出白色树脂
干燥后的PI树脂重新溶解于DMAc，配制成固含量10wt%的溶液
经0.45μm Teflon滤器过滤除去杂质
倒入高纯乙醇中再次析出得到PI树脂

位置索引.原文: Into a  250 mL three-necked flask equipped with a mechanical stirrer and a nitrogen inlet, the diamine BDAF  (5.1845g, 0.01mol)  was first dissolved in newly distilled DMAc  (20g). Then, the dianhydride HTDA  (3.0631g, 0.01mol)  and additional DMAc  (4.7g)  were added into the homogeneous diamine solution, producing a reaction system with a solid content of  25wt%. After stirring at room temperature for  24h, a mixture of acetic anhydride  (5.1g, 0.05mol)  and pyridine  (3.2g, 0.04mol)  was then added. The reaction solution was stirred at room temperature for another  24h. Then, the obtained viscous solution was carefully poured into an excess of ethanol to yield white resin. The resin was filtered and dried at  80°C in vacuum for  24h  (Yield:  ~96%). The well-dried PI resin was redissolved into DMAc with a solid content of  10wt%. Then, the PI solution was filtered through a  0.45μm Teflon filter to remove any impurities. Next, the PI solution was slowly poured into the highly pure ethanol to afford the PI resin.

反应条件.制备过程: 将充分干燥的PI树脂溶解于DMAc，配制成目标固含量的静电纺丝溶液

位置索引.原文: The fully dried PI (HTDA-BDAF) resin was dissolved in DMAc at room temperature with different solid contents of  25 - 35wt% to obtain the electrospinning solution. Table 1: PI-2 Solid Content (wt%): 30

原料.原料类型: 聚酰亚胺静电纺丝溶液

反应条件.反应装置: 静电纺丝设备，包含5mL注射器、注射泵、喷丝头、转鼓收集器、铝箔收集基底
反应条件.制备过程: 将PI静电纺丝溶液装入注射器，通过注射泵从喷丝头挤出，在喷丝头和转鼓收集器之间施加高压电场，随机排列的PI纤维沉积在收集器的铝箔上得到PI-2 NFM
反应条件.反应条件: 注射泵推进速度0.2mL/h，喷丝头内径0.50mm，纺丝电压15kV，喷丝头与收集器间距15cm，转鼓转速200rpm，相对湿度30±5%

位置索引.原文: Four PI NFMs (PI-1~PI-4) were fabricated via the electrospinning procedure with the tailored solid contents of the PI solutions, the electrospinning voltage, and the inner diameters (IDs) of the spinnerets, as shown in Table 1. The PI solution was loaded into a  5mL  syringe and squeezed out through a spinneret by a syringe pump at a speed of  0.2mL / h. The ID values of the spinneret were 0.21 or  0.50mm. Different voltages of  12 - 18kV  were applied between the syringe and the rolling drum collector. The distance between the spinneret and the collector (alumina foil) was  15cm. Random aligned PI fibers were deposited on the aluminum foil located on the rotating drum collector (speed:  200rpm). The temperature and relative humidity during electrospinning were fixed at about  20 ± 2°C  and  30 ± 5%, respectively. Table 1: PI-2: Solid Content 30 wt%, Voltage Supply 15 kV, Spinneret ID 0.50 mm

parse.why: 抽取目标对象PI-2 NFM从上游PI树脂合成、纺丝液制备到最终静电纺丝成膜的直接相关工艺流程，按产物节点切分，未混入无关平行样品

        "原文": "Four PI NFMs (PI-1~PI-4) were fabricated via the electrospinning procedure with the tailored solid contents of the PI solutions, the electrospinning voltage, and the inner diameters (IDs) of the spinnerets, as shown in Table 1. The PI solution was loaded into a  5mL  syringe and squeezed out through a spinneret by a syringe pump at a speed of  0.2mL / h. The ID values of the spinneret were 0.21 or  0.50mm. Different voltages of  12 - 18kV  were applied between the syringe and the rolling drum collector. The distance between the spinneret and the collector (alumina foil) was  15cm. Random aligned PI fibers were deposited on the aluminum foil located on the rotating drum collector (speed:  200rpm). The temperature and relative humidity during electrospinning were fixed at about  20 ± 2°C  and  30 ± 5%, respectively. Table 1: PI-2: Solid Content 30 wt%, Voltage Supply 15 kV, Spinneret ID 0.50 mm"
